name: Strawberries with Pine Nut-Praline Cream
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 15 minutes. Cooking time: 5 minutes.
Vanilla yogurt can be used in place of whipped cream.
1. Heat the sugar and water in a small heavy saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring constantly until all the sugar is melted and the mixture is a rich medium brown.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the pine nuts. Spread on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and let cool completely.
3. Break cooled nut mixture into pieces and grind to a powder in a food processor or blender.
4. Whip cream until it holds soft peaks. Stir in vanilla extract and half of the ground nut mixture.
5. To serve, spoon some whipped cream into serving dishes; top with berries and sprinkle with the remaining nut powder.
